title: story-19-review-churn
description:
This is a continuation of the broader review-churn pattern, now centered on story 19. Since the prior summarizer window, story 19 completed another successful dev->reviewer cycle: a dev run ended at 2026-05-29T01:15:34.612068+00:00 and a reviewer run followed at 2026-05-29T01:15:53.096821+00:00. The watcher note reports that story 19 is still active in this window with 7 reviewer cycles total and $1.7493 cumulative dev/reviewer cost, which is well beyond the documented 3-cycle convergence ceiling for review churn.

The immediate downstream impact is continued spend and operator attention on a story that is still not converging despite repeated successful runs. This is not a failure-mode signal; the runs themselves are succeeding, but the repeated reviewer activity indicates the story is cycling without reaching completion. Based on the available evidence, the pattern is structural and persistent rather than transient.

A separate factory-side SM truncation pattern also repeated in the same window, with two explicit `finish_reason=length` JSON-parse failures at 2026-05-29T01:16:04.690885+00:00 and 2026-05-29T01:16:04.719995+00:00 before recovery on the next attempt. That issue is already covered by the prior `sm-max-tokens-truncation-repeat` concern and remains ongoing, but the changed evidence in this window is the active increase of story 19 review churn.

evidence.summary_excerpt: Story 19 was active and completed another successful dev->reviewer cycle, pushing it to 7 reviewer cycles total while still active in this window.

evidence.excerpt: story_id=19 persona=dev success=true attempt_n=10 duration_s=165.224 cost_usd=0.2315645
story_id=19 persona=reviewer success=true attempt_n=7 duration_s=18.184 cost_usd=0.0423375
Two SM failures in this window again explicitly name a factory-side truncation cause (`json parse failed ... finish_reason=length`).
persona=sm success=false error="json parse failed at max_tokens=65536 finish_reason=length: Unterminated string starting at: line 1 column 9 (char 8)"
persona=sm success=false error="json parse failed at max_tokens=8192 finish_reason=length: Unterminated string starting at: line 1 column 7 (char 6)"

escalation_reason: Story 19 is in an active non-converging review loop with 7 reviewer cycles and $1.7493 cumulative dev/reviewer cost so far, well past the 3-cycle escalation threshold. This pattern is ongoing in the current window and merits L3 judgment because it is sustained structural churn with measurable cost; the concurrent SM truncation failures also confirm broader ongoing instability already tracked separately.
